title: Launch App CTA navigates from landing page to main app
description: Verifies the primary "Launch App" call-to-action on the landing page opens the main DeadlineOS app page.

title: Try Demo flow loads demo page and starts demo UI with sample data
description: Verifies the "Try Demo" CTA opens the demo page and "Start Demo" reveals the demo interface.

title: Top navigation: Features link opens features overview page
description: Verifies the "Features" navigation item opens the Features page and displays feature cards/sections.

title: Top navigation: Pricing link opens pricing plans and FAQ
description: Verifies the "Pricing" navigation item opens the Pricing page and pricing/FAQ content is visible.

title: Top navigation: Roadmap link opens product roadmap page
description: Verifies the "Roadmap" navigation item opens the Roadmap page and timeline content is visible.

title: Top navigation: Compare link opens competitor comparison page
description: Verifies the "Compare" navigation item opens the comparison page and competitor comparison content is visible.

title: Footer navigation: Privacy link opens privacy policy page
description: Verifies the "Privacy" link opens the privacy policy page and policy content is visible.

title: Landing page FAQ accordion expands and shows answer text
description: Verifies that clicking an FAQ item expands it to reveal answer content on the landing page.

title: Create a new task with title, future deadline, and priority
description: Verifies a user can create a task and see it appear in the task list with the chosen details.

steps.description: Click Tasks tab to open task panel
Type "E2E Create Task" into the task title field
Verify text "E2E Create Task" is visible

title: Edit an existing task title and deadline
description: Verifies a user can edit a task and the updated details are shown in the list.

steps.description: Click Tasks tab to open task panel
Type "E2E Task To Edit" into the task title field
Click edit icon on the task "E2E Task To Edit"
Type "E2E Task Edited" into the task title field
Verify text "E2E Task Edited" is visible

title: Complete a task and observe completion state and XP feedback
description: Verifies a user can mark a task complete and sees a visible completion indicator and XP-awarded feedback.

steps.description: Click Tasks tab to open task panel
Type "E2E Complete Me" into the task title field
Click task checkbox for "E2E Complete Me"

title: Delete an uncompleted task and confirm it is removed
description: Verifies a user can delete a task via confirmation and it disappears from the list.

steps.description: Click Tasks tab to open task panel
Type "E2E Delete Me" into the task title field
Click delete icon for "E2E Delete Me"
Verify text "E2E Delete Me" is not visible

title: Validate required title when saving a new task
description: Verifies saving a task without a title shows a visible validation error and does not create the task.

steps.description: Click Tasks tab to open task panel

title: Create a task with a past deadline and see overdue warning/flag
description: Verifies entering a past deadline results in a visible overdue warning or overdue status indicator on the task.

steps.description: Click Tasks tab to open task panel
Type "E2E Past Deadline" into the task title field

title: Filter tasks by Today and verify only today tasks are shown
description: Verifies the Today filter shows tasks due today and hides tasks with future deadlines.

steps.description: Click Tasks tab to open task panel
Type "E2E Due Today" into the task title field
Fill today's date into the deadline field
Type "E2E Future Task" into the task title field
Verify text "E2E Due Today" is visible
Verify text "E2E Future Task" is not visible

title: Send a chat message with API key and receive an AI response
description: Verifies that a user can open AI Commander, enter an API key, send a message, and see an AI response displayed in the chat window.

steps.description: Type "Help me prioritize my top 3 tasks today" in chat input field
Verify an assistant/AI response message is visible in the chat window

title: Use Enter key to send a message
description: Verifies that pressing Enter submits the chat message and a response appears.

steps.description: Type "Give me a quick plan for the next 30 minutes" in chat input field
Verify an assistant/AI response message is visible in the chat window

title: Analyze tasks via chat then generate AI Analysis action plan
description: Verifies the multi-step workflow of asking for task analysis, then using the AI Analysis button to produce a prioritized plan.

steps.description: Type "analyze my tasks" in chat input field

title: Missing API key shows warning and returns mock response
description: Verifies that when no API key is entered, the UI warns the user and still displays a mock AI response.

steps.description: Type "What should I work on next?" in chat input field
Verify a response message is visible in the chat window

title: Chat preserves multi-turn conversation context in the UI
description: Verifies that multiple user messages and multiple AI responses appear in sequence as a continuing conversation.

steps.description: Type "Summarize my priorities" in chat input field
Type "Now turn that into 3 bullet points" in chat input field
Verify text "Now turn that into 3 bullet points" is visible

title: Empty message is not sent (input validation)
description: Verifies the chat prevents sending an empty message and does not add a blank user message to the conversation.

title: Very long message still sends and shows in chat history
description: Verifies the chat can accept and display a long user prompt without breaking the conversation UI.

steps.description: Type "Here are my tasks: task A with many details, task B with many details, task C with many details. Please create a detailed schedule with time blocks and contingency steps." in chat input field
Verify text "Here are my tasks:" is visible

title: Pomodoro mode: start timer and verify countdown begins
description: Verifies that selecting Pomodoro mode and starting the timer begins a visible countdown in the Timer tab.

steps.description: Click Start button to begin timer countdown
Verify text "Pomodoro" is visible in the Timer area

title: Deep Work mode: start, pause, then reset to initial value
description: Verifies Deep Work timer can be started, paused, and reset back to its initial value.

steps.description: Click Start button to begin timer countdown

title: Validation: clicking Start without selecting a mode shows prompt
description: Verifies the app prevents starting the timer until Pomodoro or Deep Work mode is selected.

steps.description: Click Start button to begin timer countdown

title: Switch modes after selecting one (pre-start) updates the mode shown
description: Verifies the user can change between Pomodoro and Deep Work before starting, and the selected mode is reflected on-screen.

steps.description: Verify text "Pomodoro" is visible in the Timer area
Verify text "Deep Work" is visible in the Timer area

title: Pause state: pausing keeps the timer on the same time value
description: Verifies that after pausing, the visible countdown does not continue to change while paused.

steps.description: Click Start button to begin timer countdown

title: Reset while running returns to initial value and shows Start available
description: Verifies that resetting during an active session stops the run and returns the timer to its initial state.

steps.description: Click Start button to begin timer countdown

title: Session tracking UI is present in Timer tab
description: Verifies that the Timer tab displays a visible session count or completed sessions area for tracking progress.

title: View Analytics overview (XP, level, achievements, streak)
description: Verifies the Analytics tab renders the core gamification widgets: XP bar, current level, achievements, and streak counter.

title: 14-day activity sparkline is visible on Analytics tab
description: Verifies the 14-day activity sparkline section is present and visible to the user.

title: Earn XP by completing a task and see Analytics reflect progress
description: Verifies completing a task increases visible XP/level progress when returning to Analytics.

steps.description: Type "E2E XP Task" into the task input field
Click the complete checkbox for "E2E XP Task"

title: Create and save a new note from the Notes tab
description: Verifies a user can create a note with title and content and see it appear in the notes list.

steps.description: Type "Sprint Retro" into the note title field
Type "Discuss wins, blockers, and next actions for the week." into the note content field

title: Edit an existing saved note and verify updates persist in the note view
description: Verifies a user can open an existing note, update its content, save, and see the updated content displayed.

steps.description: Type "Daily Log" into the note title field
Type "Initial entry." into the note content field
Click on the note titled "Daily Log" in the notes list

title: Delete a note and confirm it no longer appears in the notes list
description: Verifies a user can delete a saved note and the note is removed from the visible list.

steps.description: Type "Temporary Note" into the note title field
Type "This note will be deleted." into the note content field
Click delete on the note titled "Temporary Note"

title: AI Summarize without API key returns mock/demo summary content
description: Verifies AI summarization works in mock mode when no API key is provided and shows a visible summary output.

steps.description: Type "Meeting Notes" into the note title field
Type "We discussed Q2 goals and risks. Next steps: draft plan and assign owners." into the note content field
Click on the note titled "Meeting Notes" in the notes list
Click AI Summarize to get AI-generated summary

title: AI Summarize with an API key field present allows sending and displays a summary section
description: Verifies the summarization flow supports entering an API key (when prompted) and shows a generated summary area after sending.

steps.description: Type "Long Note" into the note title field
Type "This is a longer note intended for summarization. It contains multiple sentences to condense." into the note content field
Click on the note titled "Long Note" in the notes list
Click AI Summarize to get AI-generated summary
Type "invalid-api-key-for-ui-test" into the API key field (if it is shown)

title: Extract Tasks creates task items visible in the Tasks tab
description: Verifies extracting tasks from a note creates visible tasks in the Tasks area.

steps.description: Type "Action Items" into the note title field
Type "Tasks: 1) Email Alice about timeline. 2) Create draft spec. 3) Schedule review meeting." into the note content field
Click on the note titled "Action Items" in the notes list
Click Extract Tasks to create tasks from note content

title: Attempt to save a note with an empty title shows visible validation or prevents creation
description: Verifies the UI blocks creating a note without a title or provides visible feedback.

steps.description: Type "Body without title" into the note content field
Verify text "Body without title" is not visible

title: Open a saved note from the notes list displays its content
description: Verifies selecting a note loads the correct title/content into the note view.

steps.description: Type "Reference" into the note title field
Type "Keep this as a reference note." into the note content field
Click on the note titled "Reference" in the notes list
Verify text "Keep this as a reference note." is visible

title: Create a new team profile without a PIN
description: Verifies a user can create a team profile (name + avatar) and see it in the profile list.

steps.description: Type "Alex QA" into the name field
Verify text "Alex QA" is visible in the profile list

title: Create a new team profile with a PIN (PIN-protected profile appears)
description: Verifies a user can create a PIN-protected profile and it appears in the profile list.

steps.description: Verify text "Priya" is visible in the profile list

title: Create profile validation: attempt to save with empty name
description: Verifies the UI prevents creating a profile without a name and shows a visible validation message or remains on the form.

title: Generate a daily plan from tasks (Plan tab) and view the hourly schedule
description: Verifies that a user can generate a plan and see an 8am–6pm schedule with tasks mapped into time slots.

steps.description: Verify element "AI-generated hourly schedule" is visible
Verify element "tasks mapped to time slots" is visible

title: Prompt for API key when generating a plan (if required)
description: Verifies that the app asks for an API key (when needed) and that the user can proceed to a generated plan view.

steps.description: Type "invalid_key_for_test" into the API key field

title: Generate plan using demo mode data (demo workflow from the demo page)
description: Verifies that demo mode produces a mock daily plan based on pre-populated demo tasks.

steps.description: Verify element "AI-generated hourly schedule" is visible

title: Generate plan with no tasks and no API key shows task validation message
description: Verifies that attempting to generate a plan without any tasks shows a validation message requesting at least one task.

steps.description: Verify text "at least one task" is visible
Verify text "add a task" is visible

title: Regenerate plan updates the visible schedule content
description: Verifies that clicking Generate Plan again refreshes the schedule output (new or updated plan content is shown).

steps.description: Verify element "AI-generated hourly schedule" is visible
Verify element "AI-generated hourly schedule" is visible

title: Apply Forest theme and see immediate visual update
description: Verifies that selecting the Forest theme updates the UI colors immediately.

steps.description: Verify element "theme switcher button" is visible
Click on "theme switcher button" in the topbar
Verify element "theme switcher button" is visible
Verify element "selected theme indicator shows Forest" is visible

title: Switch from Forest to Default theme in the same session
description: Verifies that theme can be changed multiple times and Default can be re-applied without issues.

steps.description: Click on "theme switcher button" in the topbar
Verify element "selected theme indicator shows Forest" is visible
Click on "theme switcher button" in the topbar
Verify element "selected theme indicator shows Default" is visible

title: Apply Ice theme and see immediate visual update
description: Verifies that selecting the Ice theme updates the UI and the selected option is reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Click on "theme switcher button" in the topbar
Verify element "selected theme indicator shows Ice" is visible
Verify element "topbar reflects Ice theme styling" is visible

title: Theme switcher menu opens and shows all four theme options
description: Verifies that the theme switcher exposes the complete set of available themes (Default, Forest, Ember, Ice).

steps.description: Click on "theme switcher button" in the topbar

title: Theme switcher can be dismissed without changing theme
description: Verifies that closing the theme switcher (without selecting a theme) leaves the current theme unchanged.

steps.description: Verify element "theme switcher button" is visible
Click on "theme switcher button" in the topbar
Verify element "theme options menu" is not visible
Verify element "selected theme indicator shows Default" is visible

title: Unsupported CSS variables fallback shows default theme and an informational message
description: Verifies the user-facing fallback behavior when CSS variables are not supported (default theme + visible message).

steps.description: Click on "theme switcher button" in the topbar
Verify element "selected theme indicator shows Default" is visible

title: Start Demo loads main app with pre-populated demo content
description: Verifies that starting demo from the demo page takes the user to the main app and shows pre-filled tasks/notes/profiles.

steps.description: Verify at least one task item is visible in the Tasks area
Verify at least one note item is visible in the Notes area

title: Start Demo shows pre-filled team/profiles content
description: Verifies that demo mode includes pre-populated team or profile information in the main app.

steps.description: Verify at least one profile or team member card/row is visible

title: Auto-Demo Start plays a brief walkthrough and updates demo tasks
description: Verifies that the auto-demo walkthrough begins and results in visible changes consistent with an automated demo sequence.

steps.description: Verify element "Walkthrough" or "Demo" animation area is visible
Verify at least one task item is visible in the Tasks area
Verify that a task list change is visible (for example, a new task appears or a task status changes)

title: Demo AI Commander provides mock responses without an API key
description: Verifies that in demo mode, the AI Commander can be used without entering an API key and returns a visible mock response.

steps.description: Verify element "AI Commander" panel is visible
Type "Summarize my tasks" into the AI prompt input
Verify a new AI response message is visible in the conversation area

title: Demo AI analysis uses mock output when no API key is provided
description: Verifies that demo mode surfaces AI-driven analysis content using built-in mock responses without requiring an API key.

steps.description: Verify text indicating an AI insight/analysis area is visible
Verify at least one AI insight/analysis item is visible

title: Entering an invalid API key in demo session shows an API key error banner and falls back to mock responses
description: Verifies that providing an invalid API key triggers a visible error and the app continues to operate using mock AI responses.

steps.description: Type "not-a-real-key" into the API key field
Click "Save" or "Apply" for the API key
Verify an error banner or error text about the API key is visible

title: After invalid API key, AI Commander still returns a response (mock fallback)
description: Verifies that after an invalid API key is entered, AI interactions still produce a visible response via mock fallback.

steps.description: Type "not-a-real-key" into the API key field
Click "Save" or "Apply" for the API key
Type "Create a plan for finishing my top 3 tasks" into the AI prompt input
Verify a new AI response message is visible in the conversation area

title: Demo mode supports basic interaction with pre-populated tasks
description: Verifies that demo tasks are not just visible but interactable within the main app (basic task action results in visible change).

steps.description: Verify at least one task item is visible in the Tasks area
Click on the first visible task item
Verify an expanded task detail view or task edit panel becomes visible
Click the task "Complete" checkbox or "Mark done" control
Verify a visible indication of completion appears for that task (for example, "Done" label or checked state shown)

title: Manual switch to English updates UI immediately
description: Verifies the language toggle can switch the UI to English without a page reload and that key labels update immediately.

steps.description: Verify element "Topbar language toggle" is visible.
Click on "EN" option in the language menu.

title: Manual switch to German updates UI immediately
description: Verifies the language toggle can switch the UI to German and that key labels update immediately.

steps.description: Verify element "Topbar language toggle" is visible.
Click on "DE" option in the language menu.

title: Switching languages twice returns UI labels correctly (DE -> EN)
description: Verifies repeated toggling is stable and UI labels correctly return to English after switching from German.

steps.description: Click on "DE" option in the language menu.
Click on "EN" option in the language menu.

title: DE selection shows fallback-to-English for untranslated legacy strings and displays a notice
description: Verifies that when German is selected, any untranslated legacy strings fall back to English and a notice to report missing translations is visible.

steps.description: Click on "DE" option in the language menu.
Verify text "Report missing translations" is visible.

title: Language menu opens and closes without changing language when dismissed
description: Verifies the language menu can be opened and dismissed without applying a different language selection.

steps.description: Verify element "Topbar language toggle" is visible.
Verify element "Language menu" is not visible.
Verify element "Topbar language toggle" is visible.

title: Language setting persists within the session when navigating between tabs
description: Verifies that after switching languages, navigating within the app tabs keeps the chosen language visible on tab labels.

steps.description: Click on "EN" option in the language menu.

title: Update mood to Neutral from the status bar
description: Verifies selecting the 'Neutral' mood updates the visible mood indicator in the status bar.

steps.description: Click on the mood emoji button in the status bar

title: Change energy level to 6/8 from the status bar
description: Verifies selecting energy level 6/8 updates the visible energy value in the status bar.

steps.description: Click on the energy level selector in the status bar

title: Mood selection persists after a page reload
description: Verifies the chosen mood remains visible after reloading the app (localStorage persistence).

steps.description: Click on the mood emoji button in the status bar

title: Energy selection persists after a page reload
description: Verifies the chosen energy level remains visible after reloading the app (localStorage persistence).

steps.description: Click on the energy level selector in the status bar

title: Rapidly change mood multiple times and confirm the final selection is shown
description: Verifies the mood control remains responsive during rapid changes and the final mood selection is reflected in the indicator.

steps.description: Click on the mood emoji button in the status bar
Click on the mood emoji button in the status bar

title: Set low mood and low energy and trigger AI Analysis (demo/mock response)
description: Verifies the user can set mood and energy, then run AI Analysis and see an analysis response area appear (without requiring a real API key).

steps.description: Click on the mood emoji button in the status bar
Click on a low/negative mood option (for example, "Sad" or "Stressed")
Click on the energy level selector in the status bar
Click on a low energy level option (for example, "1/8" or "2/8")
Verify element "AI analysis response" is visible
